headline: Analog Devices Inc (NASDAQ:ADI) Combines Strong Fundamentals with Technical Breakout Potential
summary: Analog Devices (ADI) combines strong sales growth, accelerating earnings, and a bullish technical breakout pattern, signaling a powerful growth investment opportunity.

headline: Global markets after Iran strikes: Oil surges, airlines sink, bonds defy safe-haven playbook
summary: Global markets started the day lower across the board, with major sectors in Europe and Asia negative.
